name: image-ppt-king-skill-runtime
description: Public fallback runtime dependencies for the Image-PPT-King Codex skill.

scripts.demo: node scripts/build_ppt_from_layers.mjs --backend pptxgenjs --layers-root assets/demo/visual-layers --text-json assets/demo/text-layer.json --out outputs/demo/editable.pptx --workspace outputs/demo/workspace --slide-size 960x540
